svg.text: AI that listens, understands, and speaks back.

g.text: Behind the ear. Invisible to others.
Koe MINI — 5g, you forget it's there
Fits in your palm. Feels like a river stone.
Clips to your pocket. Records your day.
Always listening, always learning about you
On your desk. Fills the room with sound.
Koe STUDIO — 28mm driver, passive radiator, Hi-Fi quality
Wears like jewelry. Works like magic.
Ceramic White — gold chain, 5 grams of intelligence
Run with it. Sweat on it. It keeps up.
Pick your voice. Wear your AI.
